narrative:
Bloom Township has 1,675 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.3 percentage points.
